---
title: "The Toolbox"
subtitle: "Tools, packages, and resources I use for data science"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: table
  template: ../_templates/toolbox-table.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  fields: [title, categories, status, link]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Tool Name"
    categories: "Category"
    status: "My Verdict"
    link: "Link"
page-layout: full
---

## About This Toolbox

This is my running list of tools, packages, and resources I've tested for data science, sports analytics, and development. Think of it as a living document of what works, what doesn't, and what I'm currently experimenting with.

**Legend:**
- **Active Use** - Currently using in projects
- **Testing** - Trying it out, jury's still out
- **Archived** - Tested but not actively using

Browse by category or use the filters above to find what you need.

<!-- Listing automatically generates below -->
